recommendations.title: Nightcrawler
recommendations.overview: When Lou Bloom, desperate for work, muscles into the world of L.A. crime journalism, he blurs the line between observer and participant to become the star of his own story. Aiding him in his effort is Nina, a TV-news veteran.

recommendations.title: To Die For
recommendations.overview: Suzanne Stone wants to be a world-famous news anchor and she is willing to do anything to get what she wants. What she lacks in intelligence, she makes up for in cold determination and diabolical wiles. As she pursues her goal with relentless focus,

recommendations.title: Meet the Malawas
recommendations.overview: A news anchor, a comedian, an actress, and a soccer player with big egos have to travel across the globe to meet the Malawa tribe for a TV show.

recommendations.title: Broadcast News
recommendations.overview: A high-strung news producer finds herself in a love triangle between a talented but self-doubting reporter and a charming news anchor who embodies the growing trivialization of news that she is determined to fight against.

recommendations.title: On the Waterfront
recommendations.overview: A prizefighter-turned-longshoreman with a conscience goes up against labor leaders to expose corruption, extortion, and murder among the union ranks.

recommendations.title: Eenie Meanie
recommendations.overview: A former teenage getaway driver gets dragged back into her unsavory past when a former employer offers her a chance to save the life of her chronically unreliable ex-boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Falling Down
recommendations.overview: An ordinary man frustrated with the various flaws he sees in society begins to psychotically and violently lash out against them.

recommendations.title: White Elephant
recommendations.overview: An ex-marine enforcer must battle his conscience and code of honor when he is forced to do things for the mob.

recommendations.title: Radio Days
recommendations.overview: The Narrator tells us how the radio influenced his childhood in the days before TV. In the New York City of the late 1930s to the New Year's Eve 1944, this coming-of-age tale mixes the narrator's experiences with contemporary anecdotes and urban lege

recommendations.title: Perdiamoci di vista
recommendations.overview: Comic tale of a cynical TV star's slow-combustion romance with a young paraplegic.
